mapper.sql: ac.participant_pin, py.year as program_year, coalesce(nullif(p.corp_name, ''), nullif(trim(concat_ws(' ', p.first_name, p.last_name)), '')) as producer_name, sc.agristability_scenario_id, sc.scenario_number, sc.scenario_state_code, sc.scenario_category_code, sc.scenario_class_code, py.assigned_to_userid as assigned_to_user_id, py.assigned_to_user_guid, (sc.combined_farm_number is not null) as in_combined_farm, acl.applied_benefit_percent as benefit_combined_farm_percent, se.scenario_enrolment_id, se.enrolment_year, se.enrolment_fee, se.contribution_margin, se.benefit_calculated_ind, se.proxy_margins_calculated_ind, se.manual_calculated_ind, se.has_productive_units_ind, se.has_benchmark_per_units_ind, se.benefit_enrolment_fee, se.benefit_contribution_margin, se.proxy_enrolment_fee, se.proxy_contribution_margin, se.manual_enrolment_fee, se.manual_contribution_margin, se.margin_year_minus_2, se.margin_year_minus_3, se.margin_year_minus_4, se.margin_year_minus_5, se.margin_year_minus_6, se.margin_year_minus_2_ind, se.margin_year_minus_3_ind, se.margin_year_minus_4_ind, se.margin_year_minus_5_ind, se.margin_year_minus_6_ind, se.benefit_margin_year_minus_2, se.benefit_margin_year_minus_3, se.benefit_margin_year_minus_4, se.benefit_margin_year_minus_5, se.benefit_margin_year_minus_6, se.benefit_margn_year_minus_2_ind, se.benefit_margn_year_minus_3_ind, se.benefit_margn_year_minus_4_ind, se.benefit_margn_year_minus_5_ind, se.benefit_margn_year_minus_6_ind, se.proxy_margin_year_minus_2, se.proxy_margin_year_minus_3, se.proxy_margin_year_minus_4, se.manual_margin_year_minus_2, se.manual_margin_year_minus_3, se.manual_margin_year_minus_4, se.combined_farm_percent, se.enrolment_calc_type_code, se.revision_count
mapper.select: select from farms.farm_agristability_clients ac join farms.farm_program_years py on py.agristability_client_id = ac.agristability_client_id join farms.farm_program_year_versions pyv on pyv.program_year_id = py.program_year_id join farms.farm_agristability_scenarios sc on sc.program_year_version_id = pyv.program_year_version_id left join farms.farm_scenario_enrolments se on se.agristability_scenario_id = sc.agristability_scenario_id left join farms.farm_agristability_claims acl on acl.agristability_scenario_id = sc.agristability_scenario_id left join farms.farm_persons p on p.person_id = ac.person_id where ac.participant_pin = #{participantPin} and py.year = #{programYear} and sc.scenario_category_code = 'ENW' and sc.scenario_class_code = 'USER' order by sc.scenario_number desc limit 1

with productive_units as ( select puc.inventory_item_code, puc.structure_group_code, coalesce(puc.inventory_item_code, puc.structure_group_code) as code, coalesce(iic.description, sgc.description) as description, sum(puc.productive_capacity_amount) as productive_capacity from farms.farm_productve_unit_capacities puc left join farms.farm_inventory_item_codes iic on iic.inventory_item_code = puc.inventory_item_code left join farms.farm_structure_group_codes sgc on sgc.structure_group_code = puc.structure_group_code where puc.agristability_scenario_id = #{agristabilityScenarioId} and coalesce(puc.productive_capacity_amount, 0) <> 0 group by puc.inventory_item_code, puc.structure_group_code, coalesce(puc.inventory_item_code, puc.structure_group_code), coalesce(iic.description, sgc.description) ), bpu_leads as ( select sy.reference_year, coalesce(bct.bpu_lead_ind, 'Y') as bpu_lead_ind from ( select sc.agristability_scenario_id, py.year as reference_year from farms.farm_agristability_scenarios sc join farms.farm_program_year_versions pyv on pyv.program_year_version_id = sc.program_year_version_id join farms.farm_program_years py on py.program_year_id = pyv.program_year_id where sc.agristability_scenario_id = #{agristabilityScenarioId}
union
select ref_sc.agristability_scenario_id, ref_py.year as reference_year from farms.farm_reference_scenarios rs join farms.farm_agristability_scenarios ref_sc on ref_sc.agristability_scenario_id = rs.agristability_scenario_id join farms.farm_program_year_versions ref_pyv on ref_pyv.program_year_version_id = ref_sc.program_year_version_id join farms.farm_program_years ref_py on ref_py.program_year_id = ref_pyv.program_year_id where rs.for_agristability_scenario_id = #{agristabilityScenarioId} ) sy left join farms.farm_benefit_calc_totals bct on bct.agristability_scenario_id = sy.agristability_scenario_id ), bpus as ( select 1 as source_priority, bpu.benchmark_per_unit_id, bpu.inventory_item_code, bpu.structure_group_code, bpu.expiry_date from farms.farm_scenario_bpu_xref sbx join farms.farm_benchmark_per_units bpu on bpu.benchmark_per_unit_id = sbx.benchmark_per_unit_id where sbx.agristability_scenario_id = #{agristabilityScenarioId} and sbx.scenario_bpu_purpose_code = 'STANDARD'
union all
select 2 as source_priority, bpu.benchmark_per_unit_id, bpu.inventory_item_code, bpu.structure_group_code, bpu.expiry_date from farms.farm_benchmark_per_units bpu where bpu.program_year = #{programYear} ) select pu.code, pu.description, pu.productive_capacity, coalesce(( select by4.average_margin from bpus xb join farms.farm_benchmark_years by4 on by4.benchmark_per_unit_id = xb.benchmark_per_unit_id cross join bpu_leads bl where bl.reference_year = #{programYear} - 2 and by4.benchmark_year = (#{programYear} - 2) - case when bl.bpu_lead_ind = 'N' then 1 else 0 end and ((pu.inventory_item_code is not null and xb.inventory_item_code = pu.inventory_item_code) or (pu.structure_group_code is not null and xb.structure_group_code = pu.structure_group_code)) order by xb.source_priority, case when xb.expiry_date is null then 0 else 1 end, xb.expiry_date desc, xb.benchmark_per_unit_id desc limit 1 ), 0) as bpu_margin_year_minus_4, coalesce(( select by3.average_margin from bpus xb join farms.farm_benchmark_years by3 on by3.benchmark_per_unit_id = xb.benchmark_per_unit_id cross join bpu_leads bl where bl.reference_year = #{programYear} - 1 and by3.benchmark_year = (#{programYear} - 1) - case when bl.bpu_lead_ind = 'N' then 1 else 0 end and ((pu.inventory_item_code is not null and xb.inventory_item_code = pu.inventory_item_code) or (pu.structure_group_code is not null and xb.structure_group_code = pu.structure_group_code)) order by xb.source_priority, case when xb.expiry_date is null then 0 else 1 end, xb.expiry_date desc, xb.benchmark_per_unit_id desc limit 1 ), 0) as bpu_margin_year_minus_3, coalesce(( select by2.average_margin from bpus xb join farms.farm_benchmark_years by2 on by2.benchmark_per_unit_id = xb.benchmark_per_unit_id cross join bpu_leads bl where bl.reference_year = #{programYear} - 1 and by2.benchmark_year = (#{programYear} - 1) - case when bl.bpu_lead_ind = 'N' then 1 else 0 end and ((pu.inventory_item_code is not null and xb.inventory_item_code = pu.inventory_item_code) or (pu.structure_group_code is not null and xb.structure_group_code = pu.structure_group_code)) order by xb.source_priority, case when xb.expiry_date is null then 0 else 1 end, xb.expiry_date desc, xb.benchmark_per_unit_id desc limit 1 ), 0) as bpu_margin_year_minus_2 from productive_units pu order by pu.description, pu.code
mapper.insert:
select nextval('farms.farm_se_seq')
insert into farms.farm_scenario_enrolments ( scenario_enrolment_id, enrolment_year, enrolment_fee, contribution_margin, benefit_calculated_ind, proxy_margins_calculated_ind, manual_calculated_ind, has_productive_units_ind, has_benchmark_per_units_ind, benefit_enrolment_fee, benefit_contribution_margin, proxy_enrolment_fee, proxy_contribution_margin, manual_enrolment_fee, manual_contribution_margin, margin_year_minus_2, margin_year_minus_3, margin_year_minus_4, margin_year_minus_5, margin_year_minus_6, margin_year_minus_2_ind, margin_year_minus_3_ind, margin_year_minus_4_ind, margin_year_minus_5_ind, margin_year_minus_6_ind, benefit_margin_year_minus_2, benefit_margin_year_minus_3, benefit_margin_year_minus_4, benefit_margin_year_minus_5, benefit_margin_year_minus_6, benefit_margn_year_minus_2_ind, benefit_margn_year_minus_3_ind, benefit_margn_year_minus_4_ind, benefit_margn_year_minus_5_ind, benefit_margn_year_minus_6_ind, proxy_margin_year_minus_2, proxy_margin_year_minus_3, proxy_margin_year_minus_4, manual_margin_year_minus_2, manual_margin_year_minus_3, manual_margin_year_minus_4, combined_farm_percent, enrolment_calc_type_code, agristability_scenario_id, revision_count, who_created, who_updated ) values ( #{dto.scenarioEnrolmentId}, #{dto.enrolmentYear}, #{dto.enrolmentFee}, #{dto.contributionMargin}, #{dto.benefitCalculatedInd}, #{dto.proxyMarginsCalculatedInd}, #{dto.manualCalculatedInd}, #{dto.hasProductiveUnitsInd}, #{dto.hasBenchmarkPerUnitsInd}, #{dto.benefitEnrolmentFee}, #{dto.benefitContributionMargin}, #{dto.proxyEnrolmentFee}, #{dto.proxyContributionMargin}, #{dto.manualEnrolmentFee}, #{dto.manualContributionMargin}, #{dto.marginYearMinus2}, #{dto.marginYearMinus3}, #{dto.marginYearMinus4}, #{dto.marginYearMinus5}, #{dto.marginYearMinus6}, #{dto.marginYearMinus2Ind}, #{dto.marginYearMinus3Ind}, #{dto.marginYearMinus4Ind}, #{dto.marginYearMinus5Ind}, #{dto.marginYearMinus6Ind}, #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus2}, #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus3}, #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus4}, #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus5}, #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus6}, #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus2Ind}, #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus3Ind}, #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus4Ind}, #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus5Ind}, #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus6Ind}, #{dto.proxyMarginYearMinus2}, #{dto.proxyMarginYearMinus3}, #{dto.proxyMarginYearMinus4}, #{dto.manualMarginYearMinus2}, #{dto.manualMarginYearMinus3}, #{dto.manualMarginYearMinus4}, #{dto.combinedFarmPercent}, #{dto.enrolmentCalcTypeCode}, #{dto.agristabilityScenarioId}, 1, #{userId}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: update farms.farm_scenario_enrolments set enrolment_year = #{dto.enrolmentYear}, enrolment_fee = #{dto.enrolmentFee}, contribution_margin = #{dto.contributionMargin}, benefit_calculated_ind = #{dto.benefitCalculatedInd}, proxy_margins_calculated_ind = #{dto.proxyMarginsCalculatedInd}, manual_calculated_ind = #{dto.manualCalculatedInd}, has_productive_units_ind = #{dto.hasProductiveUnitsInd}, has_benchmark_per_units_ind = #{dto.hasBenchmarkPerUnitsInd}, benefit_enrolment_fee = #{dto.benefitEnrolmentFee}, benefit_contribution_margin = #{dto.benefitContributionMargin}, proxy_enrolment_fee = #{dto.proxyEnrolmentFee}, proxy_contribution_margin = #{dto.proxyContributionMargin}, manual_enrolment_fee = #{dto.manualEnrolmentFee}, manual_contribution_margin = #{dto.manualContributionMargin}, margin_year_minus_2 = #{dto.marginYearMinus2}, margin_year_minus_3 = #{dto.marginYearMinus3}, margin_year_minus_4 = #{dto.marginYearMinus4}, margin_year_minus_5 = #{dto.marginYearMinus5}, margin_year_minus_6 = #{dto.marginYearMinus6}, margin_year_minus_2_ind = #{dto.marginYearMinus2Ind}, margin_year_minus_3_ind = #{dto.marginYearMinus3Ind}, margin_year_minus_4_ind = #{dto.marginYearMinus4Ind}, margin_year_minus_5_ind = #{dto.marginYearMinus5Ind}, margin_year_minus_6_ind = #{dto.marginYearMinus6Ind}, benefit_margin_year_minus_2 = #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus2}, benefit_margin_year_minus_3 = #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus3}, benefit_margin_year_minus_4 = #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus4}, benefit_margin_year_minus_5 = #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus5}, benefit_margin_year_minus_6 = #{dto.benefitMarginYearMinus6}, benefit_margn_year_minus_2_ind = #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus2Ind}, benefit_margn_year_minus_3_ind = #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus3Ind}, benefit_margn_year_minus_4_ind = #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus4Ind}, benefit_margn_year_minus_5_ind = #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus5Ind}, benefit_margn_year_minus_6_ind = #{dto.benefitMargnYearMinus6Ind}, proxy_margin_year_minus_2 = #{dto.proxyMarginYearMinus2}, proxy_margin_year_minus_3 = #{dto.proxyMarginYearMinus3}, proxy_margin_year_minus_4 = #{dto.proxyMarginYearMinus4}, manual_margin_year_minus_2 = #{dto.manualMarginYearMinus2}, manual_margin_year_minus_3 = #{dto.manualMarginYearMinus3}, manual_margin_year_minus_4 = #{dto.manualMarginYearMinus4}, combined_farm_percent = #{dto.combinedFarmPercent}, enrolment_calc_type_code = #{dto.enrolmentCalcTypeCode}, revision_count = #{dto.revisionCount} + 1, who_updated = #{userId}, when_updated = statement_timestamp() where scenario_enrolment_id = #{dto.scenarioEnrolmentId} and revision_count = #{dto.revisionCount}
